content:
Parsing proposal: WattWatch — Energy Waste Detective.

Extracted:
- Tech stack: React + Vite (frontend), FastAPI (backend), Supabase + DuckDB
- Critical endpoints: /health, /anomalies, /facilities, /stats, /impact/projection
- Deployment: Railway (backend) + Vercel (frontend)

Delegating to all 4 specialists.

Build FastAPI backend for WattWatch. Endpoints: /health, /anomalies, /facilities, /stats, /impact/projection, /anomalies/{id}/assign. In-memory seed data. CORS enabled. Write to ./implementation/wattwatch/backend/
Build React + Vite frontend. Dashboard with anomaly feed, work order panel, Recharts LineChart, stats bar. API client at VITE_API_URL. Write to ./implementation/wattwatch/frontend/
Railway config (railway.toml) + Vercel config (vercel.json) + DEPLOYMENT.md with step-by-step instructions.
smoke_test.sh with 8 curl tests + QA_CHECKLIST.md from proposal demo strategy section.

✅ Backend complete.
- main.py (~370 lines): 8 endpoints, CORS, in-memory seed (50 facilities, 10 anomalies)
- requirements.txt, .env.example, README.md
- Health check returns {status: 'ok', service: 'wattwatch-api', version: '0.1.0'}

✅ DevOps complete.
- railway.toml: rootDirectory=backend, healthcheck /health
- vercel.json: framework=vite, SPA rewrite
- DEPLOYMENT.md: Railway 7 steps + Vercel 6 steps + troubleshooting

✅ QA complete.
- smoke_test.sh: 8 tests (health, anomalies, facilities, stats, impact, CORS, contract, response time)
- QA_CHECKLIST.md: pre-demo, demo flow, integration, failure modes
- API contract validated: Frontend calls match Backend endpoints

✅ Frontend complete.
- App.jsx with 15s auto-refresh
- AnomalyFeed.jsx: sorted by cost, severity badges
- WorkOrderPanel.jsx: LineChart + work order + Assign button
- StatsBar.jsx + ImpactProjection.jsx
- package.json, vite.config.js, styles.css
- Builds clean: 583 kB JS / 8 kB CSS

All 4 specialists done. Integration verified:
- ✅ Backend health check: {status: 'ok'}
- ✅ /anomalies returns data with embedded work_order objects
- ✅ Frontend npm run build succeeds
- ✅ Smoke tests: 8 passed, 0 failed
- ✅ API contract: Frontend calls match Backend exactly

Ship it. 🚀
